raw: Are you ready to Go Outside? We are making it even easier for you with the Trustees GO Pass! This pass provides 2 free or reduced admissions (member rate) to Trustees properties all over Massachusetts. Children under 18 have free admission. Get outside and explore historical homes, wander through cow pastures, marshlands and view waterfalls as you hike through all that Massachusetts has to offer. Visit the Trustees website for more information on places to visit with the pass. Pass must be picked up at the library. Some venues may required a timed ticket. GO Passes are valid for admission only (not valid for discounts at parking kiosks, stores, cafes, inns, campgrounds, special events/programs, or equipment rentals). Go Passes are NOT valid for Crane Beach. Walk-in admission with a GO Pass will only be permitted if there is available capacity at the venue. THE LIBRARY PASS DOES NOT GUARANTEE ADMISSION Funded by the Donation Account.
